strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple production platforms
Strong software craftsmanship background including TDD, CI/CD, and clean architecture practices
Berlin-based with relevant exposure to AI/LLM agent infrastructure and Kubernetes deployments
concerns: Seniority mismatch — candidate is Staff/Senior level applying for a junior/mid role
Limited explicit PostgreSQL experience; database work appears focused on MongoDB
Basic German proficiency may limit collaboration in a high on-site German construction-tech environment
response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced fullstack engineer whose technical skills in TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, and Kubernetes substantially exceed the requirements of this entry-level role. They bring strong craftsmanship habits and relevant Berlin-based experience, but the role targets a junior/mid contributor, and the resume emphasizes MongoDB over PostgreSQL. Fit depends heavily on whether the candidate is genuinely seeking a step down in seniority and is comfortable with the on-site, German-language work environment.
